task.summary: Evaluate the attached homepage strategy proposal with available advisory models, Decision Mesh, MCP context, and produce a GitHub-first deployment plan.

model_or_worker.name: Codex GPT-5 desktop session
model_or_worker.role: orchestrator, verifier, planner, and governance updater

reasoning_profile.change_policy: Plan-only. No Radeq runtime source or Cloudflare deployment changes were made.

input_packet_summary.summary: Proposal says Radeq.cz should sell websites/redesign/audit/repair first, keep automation/AI as follow-on value, add DoD/no-go/copy/measurement rules, and verify routes/form before production.

prompt_or_input_delta.summary: Full-context/max advisory packets were reduced to bounded advisory packets after provider timeouts. Final plan is based on local context, Decision Mesh, official docs, and Gemini default advisory only.

verification_evidence.evidence: Read strategy proposal text and confirmed the strategy text.
autopilot_decision_mesh find_risks returned relevant risk and policy nodes.
